title: Track Hand Symptoms
description: Document when hands change color, one/both hands, duration, accompanying symptoms (pain, numbness, weakness, cold), and triggers (cold, stress, static posture, caffeine).

title: Photograph Hands During Events
description: Take clear photos in real-time when hands change color, veins bulge, or there are differences between hands. Photo from 2026-05-20 10:01 already logged in health_memory.json.

title: Prepare for Rheumatologist (Tuesday 2026-05-26, 18:30)
description: Organize full description of Thursday's acute event, weekend hospitalization, hand color changes, neck pain, durations, triggers, and photos for the appointment. Bring: blood test results, referral, photo log, hospital discharge summary, current medications list.

title: Prepare for Psychiatrist (Tuesday 2026-05-26, 20:00)
description: Prepare structured psychiatric briefing: timeline of stressors (lawyer pressure background), Thursday's acute event with somatic features, weekend hospitalization psychological impact, current sleep/eating/cognitive function, fear response to hand discoloration. Include medication list. Do not pre-diagnose; present pattern only.

title: Obtain Weekend Hospital Discharge Summary
description: Retrieve the discharge summary from the weekend hospitalization. Must include: reason for admission, diagnoses considered, tests run, medications prescribed at discharge, follow-up instructions. Once obtained, store reference in health_memory.json and supply to both specialists on 2026-05-26.

title: Retrieve Recent Blood Test Results
description: Pull most recent blood test panel. If results from the weekend hospitalization are available, include those. Bring printed copies to both 2026-05-26 appointments.

title: Obtain Specialist Referrals (הפניות)
description: Confirm both referrals exist and are valid: one for the rheumatologist, one for the psychiatrist. If missing, request from family physician or sick fund before Tuesday 2026-05-26.

title: Verify Insurance Reimbursement Coverage
description: Verify reimbursement coverage for both specialist visits on 2026-05-26 (rheumatologist 18:30, psychiatrist 20:00). Identify required documents per claim. Prepare checklist for Elad to file the claims post-visit. Chen does not call insurance directly — prepares the checklist only.

title: Post-Appointment Synthesis (2026-05-26 evening)
description: After both Tuesday appointments, synthesize findings from rheumatologist and psychiatrist into a single update for health_memory.json. Log: diagnoses given, tests ordered, medications prescribed, follow-up timeline, any contradictions between the two specialists' views. Update hypotheses_monitored list based on what was ruled in or out.

title: Obtain Missing Sick Days (ימי מחלה)
description: User has hospital discharge (15-16/05) and medical approvals for 17-18/05. Request sent to family doctor for the remaining missing certificates for 19/05 and 20/05. Waiting for doctor's response.
